raw_consumer_statement:
There were over XXXX dollars worth of purchases made on the card, all of which were clearly not mine and should have been flagged earlier. I only found out about this because I got a notice that I had a late fee, and I knew I had not used the card. I am showing two late pays on charges that arent mine. I have called the company twice dating back to XX/XX/XXXX and was promised that letters were being sent. Did not get them, made another call. Found out not all fraud charges were flagged, again requested the letter. Nothing received. Meanwhile this has had a major impact on my credit. 

Barclays allowed someone to change all of my information on the account, basically an account takeover. I feel they did not adequately protect me.
